generated_oml:
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal regulation component for incubator heatbed"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan for temperature regulation"
]

instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container for thermal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi controller processing sensor data and controlling actuators"
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor inside the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor1Data
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Second internal temperature sensor inside the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor2Data
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External ambient temperature sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempSensorData
]

instance InternalTempSensor1Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTempSensor2Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined internal temperature readings from both internal sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor1Data, InternalTempSensor2Data
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ExternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "External ambient temperature reading"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel2Param : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter analytical thermal simulation model for incubator heatbed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel4Param : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter analytical thermal simulation model for incubator heatbed with higher fidelity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithms updating model parameters using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine predicting thermal dynamics for proactive control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalPredictionService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Mechanisms detecting sensor or hardware anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System state visualization for operator oversight"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemVisualizationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Systems assessing safety and optimality violations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms updating model parameters with sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParametersUpdatedInsight
]

instance ThermalPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of thermal dynamics for proactive control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight, AdjustHeatbedPower, AdjustFanSpeed
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms identifying sensor or hardware anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance SystemVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of system state for operator oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring systems assessing safety and optimality violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetectedInsight, OptimalityViolationDetectedInsight, HumanInterventionAction
]

instance ModelParametersUpdatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters reflecting current system state"
]

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal dynamics for future control adjustments"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detected in sensor or hardware"
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of system state for operator review"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety threshold exceeded in system operation"
]

instance OptimalityViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimality threshold not met, requiring adjustment"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPower : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power to maintain target temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of fan speed for air circulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of Physical Twin by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Incubator system for precise temperature control"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, StyrofoamInsulatedContainer, RaspberryPiController, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs calibration algorithms to update CPS and environment models using sensor data for parameter estimation, with resulting data informing monitoring components that assess system safety and optimization. Violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to adjust the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through experimental comparison of predicted versus actual thermal behavior, where the 4-parameter model's superior prediction of heatbed thermal inertia was demonstrated. Calibration algorithms adjust parameters using sensor data to minimize discrepancies, and monitoring systems detect safety violations by comparing real-time data against model outputs to trigger corrective actions."
]
